mapper.select:
select iprpm.* ,iprm.* from im_push_role_person_manage iprpm,im_push_role_manage iprm where iprpm.role_id = iprm.role_id
and iprpm.person_id like concat('%',#{imPushRolePersonManage.personId},'%')
and iprpm.person_name like concat('%',#{imPushRolePersonManage.personName},'%')
and iprpm.hx_area_name like concat('%',#{imPushRolePersonManage.hxAreaName},'%')
and iprpm.x_hx5_bp_name like concat('%',#{imPushRolePersonManage.xHx5BpName},'%')
and iprpm.hx_latn_name like concat('%',#{imPushRolePersonManage.hxLatnName},'%')
and iprpm.role_id = #{imPushRolePersonManage.roleId}
order by iprpm.create_time desc
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO im_push_role_person_manage (manage_id, role_id, person_id, person_name, hx_latn_id, hx_latn_name, hx_area_id, hx_area_name, hx_region_id, hx_region_name, x_hx5_bp_id, x_hx5_bp_name, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.manageId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.personId},#{item.personName},#{item.hxLatnId}, #{item.hxLatnName}, #{item.hxAreaId}, #{item.hxAreaName}, #{item.hxRegionId}, #{item.hxRegionName}, #{item.xHx5BpId}, #{item.xHx5BpName}, #{item.createTime})
